title: Journal of the Discovery
author: Meriwether Lewis
content: “Objects of this importance... make me fear that I shall not have it in my power to accomplish it.”
action: Acknowledge the risk and proceed anyway.

title: Autobiography
author: Kit Carson
content: “I have lived in the mountains and in the plains and I have lived with the Indians.”
action: Adapt your survival strategy to the environment.

title: The Oregon Trail
author: Francis Parkman
content: “The air was clear and dry as the breath of a furnace.”
action: Strip away all excess baggage now.

title: Letters from the Frontier
author: James Hall
content: “The character of the pioneer is formed by the necessity of the wild.”
action: Let necessity dictate your next move.

title: Roughing It
author: Mark Twain
content: “I had to endure the hardships or perish.”
action: Accept the difficulty as the only path forward.
